You spend $100, $300, sometimes more on a bottle.
But what's holding it up?

The tray is the last thing whisky lovers upgrade.
It shouldn't be.

sullow was built for people who take whisky seriously —
and want everything around it to match.

The Tray

Built without compromise.

Every sullow tray is handcrafted from FAS-grade North American Black Walnut, joined with specialty hardwoods and finished with non-toxic natural oil. Arrives in a signature magnetic case — the experience starts before you even open it.

  • FAS-grade North American Black Walnut
  • Specialty hardwood inlay joinery
  • Non-toxic natural oil finish
  • Brand logo laser engraved
  • Glencairn Crystal Cut compatible
  • Signature magnetic gift case included

Craftsmanship

Made by hand.
Every single one.

No mass production. No shortcuts.
Each tray is designed, cut, and finished individually.
